title: Converted: Empathy
description: Structured conversion of legacy contentData[7]. The original legacy slides remain available for comparison.

slides.title: Empathy as the Overarching Quality
bullets: Empathy: A cornerstone of the humanistic, client-centered approach, fostering therapeutic alliance and empowering client's self-healing.
Facilitates experiential processing of emotions, crucial for therapeutic change.
Enables the therapist to grasp the client's felt experience, fostering authentic relational depth.
